texto: I do believe that simplicity is a hallmark of maturity. But I do not believe that simplicity is necessarily a first step. Often, we must learn a depth of complexity before a beautiful simplicity blooms, whether in mind or matter.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kourosh Dini sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “I do believe that simplicity is a hallmark of maturity. But I do not believe that simplicity is n…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, productivity, simplicity, útil em momentos de reflexao.
